title: Due date still showing overdue even when the task is done
excerpt: Hi there! I’m a new user and am still working my way through all the videos and help articles. I’ve created a board and tasks are being completed and marked as done, but the date is still showing the task as overdue. Wha…

posts.author: EmCC (Emma Chard-Cumming)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! I’m a new user and am still working my way through all the videos and help articles. I’ve created a board and tasks are being completed and marked as done, but the date is still showing the task as overdue. What have I missed or not set up correctly? Thanks in advance.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@EmCC,

The basic requirements for this are that the date column is set to deadline mode and linked to the given status column and that the specific status value is selected as “done” in the column settings of the status column.

posts.author: EmCC (Emma Chard-Cumming)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you JCorrell. I was selecting the wrong status column as I have two set up! Got it all working now.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
